  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractColor
    Abstract base class for color representations in the MicroUI framework.
    AbstractLerpedColor
    An abstract base class for colors that interpolate between two other colors over time.
    Color
    Concrete implementation of AbstractColor representing a solid RGBA color.
    LerpedColor
    A concrete implementation of AbstractLerpedColor that uses a condition to control the direction of color interpolation.
    LerpedLoopColor
    A continuously looping interpolated color that automatically cycles between start and end colors.
    Stroke
    Represents a stroke style with color and weight properties for drawing outlines.
